description_long: This object consists of a tall, square, reddish-brown planter pot with a marbled texture, filled with soil and supporting a cluster of long, slender stems. Atop the stems are several round, fluffy, pale yellow to cream-colored flowers resembling pom-poms, with some flowers appearing slightly wilted or drooping. The stems are thin and greenish-brown, with a few small, flat, and slightly wilted leaves attached. The soil surface is visible at the top of the pot, and the overall arrangement is somewhat sparse, with flowers distributed unevenly. The planter appears to be made of a hard, stone-like material, and the flowers are likely artificial or dried, given their uniform color and texture. This decorative flower arrangement would be suitable for placement in urban environments such as sidewalks, building entrances, or public parks.
description: A tall, square, marbled planter holds several long-stemmed, round, pale yellow flowers with sparse leaves and visible soil. The arrangement is decorative and suited for urban settings.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the planter with a clear view of the clustered round flowers and several upright stems, with the marbled texture of the pot visible.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights more of the left side of the planter, revealing additional stems and a slightly different arrangement of the flowers, with some flowers appearing more drooped.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a look at the right side, showing the density of stems and the distribution of flowers, with the marbled pot texture still prominent.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the back side of the planter, with a focus on the stems and a few flowers that are more isolated, as well as the pot's marbled surface.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged radially around the flower head, forming dense, spherical clusters with overlapping layers, typical of composite inflorescences.
